title: The Deep Learning Training Loop
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of training a neural network, showing how data flows forward to make a prediction, how error is calculated via a loss function, and how the model's internal parameters (weights and biases) are updated via backpropagation to improve performance on the next iteration.
relationships: Data is fed into the model
Model processes input to generate a prediction
Prediction is compared to the true label to calculate loss
Loss is used to compute gradients via backpropagation
Optimizer uses gradients to update model weights
Process repeats with updated weights for the next batch of data
